log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:7+6=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 26 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 33/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
